brand.description: Static color to be used in the brand relevant UI elements.

no-color.description: Static value when no color respectively 0% opacity is needed. Temp token. Requires a primitive reference (ToDo)

unselected.description: Semantic Interaction color for not selected items. Used in Main Navigation, Navigation Tree, Tabs.

fg-static.description: Documentation only! Coming from Figma UI. Doesn't react to user preference color modes Light, Dark etc.
